title: Automate Your Workflow: Creating Stripe Customer Profiles from Monday Alterations!

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
When status changes in Monday.com, create a customer in Stripe if the customer does not exist, and update customer details in Monday.com if the customer exists.

Trigger: Monday Board Status Change
Utilizing the Monday module, we set up a trigger to initiate the automation when there’s a status change on the board.

Action 1: Search Customer in Stripe
Search to locate a customer based on specified parameters, such as name or ID.

Conditional Routing: Customer Existence Check and Updation
If the customer is found, the workflow proceeds to the “Update Item in Monday” action.
In the absence of a customer match, the flow diverts to the “Create New Customer in Stripe” and updates on Monday.
